# Babel Free

> Babel Free is a free language-learning platform. Its flagship product is El Viaje del Jaguar, a narrative-driven Spanish course aligned to the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR), covering levels A1 through C2.

## El Viaje del Jaguar — Free Spanish Course

El Viaje del Jaguar is a free, game-based Spanish language course that follows Yaguará, a jaguar spirit guide, through 89 interactive destinations set in Colombia's ecosystems: the Amazon rainforest, the Andes mountains, the Caribbean coast, and the Pacific lowlands. The course covers all six CEFR levels (A1 Breakthrough through C2 Mastery) with over 15,800 activities across 34 game types, including escape rooms, crosswords, conversational exercises, story-building, and literary analysis. It introduces 8,500+ unique Spanish words across all CEFR levels. Literary peaks feature four Colombian authors: Rafael Pombo (1833–1912), José Eustasio Rivera (1888–1928), Tomás Carrasquilla (1858–1940), and Luis Fernando Macías (contemporary). The curriculum follows a narrative structure inspired by universal storytelling patterns, and Colombian culture is the world the language lives in.

The course supports 104 native languages for A1 and A2 Basic levels. From A2 Advanced onward, it transitions to 100% Spanish immersion, following the CEFR principle that advanced language acquisition requires full target-language exposure. No payment, subscription, or credit card is required.

### Course structure

| Level | CEFR | Name | Destinations | World |
|-------|------|------|-------------|-------|
| A1 | Breakthrough | El despertar del jaguar | dest1–dest13 | Mundo de abajo |
| A2 | Waystage | El mundo de abajo | dest14–dest21 | Mundo de abajo |
| B1 | Threshold | El mundo del medio | dest22–dest42 | Mundo del medio |
| B2 | Vantage | La prueba | dest43–dest55 | Mundo del medio |
| C1 | Effective Operational Proficiency | El regreso | dest56–dest68 | Mundo de arriba |
| C2 | Mastery | La palabra del corazón | dest69–dest89 | Mundo de arriba |

### Game types (34)

conversation, fill, narrative, builder, listening, category, pair, conjuro, explorador, senda, guardian, crossword, boggle, madlibs, spaceman, madgab, consequences, flashnote, cultura, bananagrams, clon, scrabble, kloo, eco_lejano, eco_restaurar, conjugation, story, bingo, dictation, sombra, oraculo, par_minimo, cartografo, tertulia

### Key characters

- **Yaguará**: Female jaguar spirit guide, accompanies the student across all 89 destinations
- **Candelaria "Cande" Arango**: Afro-Colombian girl, 12→18, introduced at A2 Advanced
- **Don Próspero García**: Antagonist (road builder disrupting ecosystems), introduced at B1
- **Doña Asunción**: Elder listener, mentioned at A2, dies between B2–C1

### Pedagogy

- CEFR-aligned can-do descriptors at every level
- Fibonacci spiral progression: each concept returns with deeper context (5→8→13→21→34→55 encounters)
- Adaptive scaffolding: choice → drag → typing → voice → self-correction
- Evidence-based mastery: 3+ encounters, 1+ production, 75%+ success rate
- 58 escape rooms revealing fragments of the "Mapa de las Voces" meta-quest

## Course pages

- Main page: https://babelfree.com/elviajedeljaguar
- A1 Beginner: https://babelfree.com/a1
- A2 Elementary: https://babelfree.com/a2
- B1 Intermediate: https://babelfree.com/b1
- B2 Upper Intermediate: https://babelfree.com/b2
- C1 Advanced: https://babelfree.com/c1
- C2 Mastery: https://babelfree.com/c2

## Dictionary

Free multilingual dictionary covering 94 languages with 11.8 million words and 17.5 million definitions. Native-first approach: definitions in the base language with hyperlinked equivalents. CEFR-leveled entries for all 94 languages. Over 22,000 example sentences sourced from course content.

- Dictionary: https://babelfree.com/dictionary

## Blog

- What is CEFR? Language levels explained: https://babelfree.com/blog/what-is-cefr
- Spanish greetings guide: https://babelfree.com/blog/spanish-greetings-guide
- Colombian coffee culture and language: https://babelfree.com/blog/colombian-coffee-culture

## Key facts

- Price: Free (no payment, no subscription, no credit card)
- Languages supported: 104 native languages for beginners
- CEFR coverage: A1 through C2 (complete)
- Total destinations: 89
- Total activities: 18,152 (2,088 core + 16,064 ecosystem variants)
- Game types: 34
- Vocabulary: 8,500+ unique words across A1–C2
- Literary authors: 4 (Pombo, Rivera, Carrasquilla, Macías)
- Cultural setting: Colombia (Amazon, Andes, Caribbean, Pacific)
- Technology: Progressive Web App (PWA)
- Publisher: Babel Free (https://babelfree.com)
- Contact: info@babelfree.com
